data.title: Set A Goal That Inspires You — Not One That Shames You
data.description: Choose your words wisely when setting a goal, as they can impact your motivation. Focus on positive descriptions of your objectives rather than using negative language. An inspiring goal is more effective than one that induces feelings of shame or guilt. This advice is emphasized in an article published by a renowned financial publication.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Smithfield Foods Stock Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Smithfield Foods, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFD) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter earnings on Tuesday, March 24, with analysts anticipating a rise to 68 cents per share from 52 cents in the previous year. The projected revenue for the quarter is $4.15 billion, up from $3.95 billion in the prior year. The company's recent acquisition of Nathan's Famous, Inc. (NASDAQ: NATH) has generated interest among investors looking at potential gains from dividends. Smithfield Foods currently boasts an annual dividend yield of 4.33%, offering a quarterly dividend of 25 cents per share ($1.00 per year). For further information, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: VenHub Advances Autonomous Smart Store Security to Tackle Rising Retail Industry Theft and Shrink
data.description: On March 20, 2026, VenHub Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: VHUB), a prominent player in autonomous Smart Store technology, showcased its latest lineup of retail security technologies aimed at combating industry losses amounting to billions of dollars. The Company introduced six innovative solutions under the "Advanced Security & Protection Systems" category, reinforcing its Smart Store capabilities in addressing security challenges faced by retailers.

data.title: Malicious iOS malware exploits old iOS 18 versions, targeting crypto apps on unpatched iPhones - Google.
data.description: An exploit chain known as DarkSword is impacting earlier versions of iOS 18, targeting exchange and wallet applications with malware.

data.title: Tradr ETFs Reaches $3 Billion AUM Milestone in Under Two Years
data.description: Tradr ETFs has shown significant excitement for its single-stock and calendar reset leveraged ETFs in New York on March 20, 2026. The company, popular among sophisticated investors and professional traders, revealed that it has exceeded $3 billion in assets under management.

data.title: Coinbase Launches 24/7 Stock Trading For Tesla, Apple, Nvidia With 10X Leverage
data.description: Coinbase has introduced stock perpetual futures for non-U.S. users, providing 24/7 leveraged synthetic exposure to notable stocks like Tesla, Apple, and Nvidia, allowing up to 10 times leverage. This marks Coinbase's expansion as an 'Everything Exchange,' offering a diverse range of assets in one platform. Stock perpetual futures have been popular in decentralized platforms, seeing billions in daily trading volume. With this move, Coinbase becomes one of the primary centralized venues to offer this product. Customers can now engage in perpetual futures trading on stocks such as Microsoft, Alphabet, and Amazon. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Earendil Labs Announces $787 Million in Financing to Scale AI-Driven Biologics Discovery and Development
data.description: Earendil Labs, a biotechnology company utilizing artificial intelligence to develop advanced biologics, recently disclosed that it has secured $787 million in funding. This funding was obtained through various financing rounds, with contributions from prominent international investors.

data.title: Eason Technology announces election of new director
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Hong Kong, Eason Technology Limited (NYSE American: DXF) shared that Haitao He has been appointed to the board of directors and appointed as the leader of the healthcare business division. Haitao, a successful individual, will bring his expertise to the team.

data.title: Valvoline Inc. Recognized with KVC Value-Driven Partner Award
data.description: Valvoline Inc. (NYSE: VVV) based in Lexington, Kentucky, has received the Value-Based Partner Award from KVC for its commitment to supporting communities in the state. KVC is a nonprofit focused on enhancing family well-being and safeguarding children. Valvoline was acknowledged for its collaboration with KVC, emphasizing the importance of urgency and creativity in addressing community needs. This partnership highlights Valvoline's dedication to making a positive impact in Kentucky by working alongside KVC to create innovative solutions for pressing social issues.

data.title: Pepsi® Global Unveils Pepsi Football Nation - A New Global Platform Celebrating Football Culture Beyond the 90 Minutes
data.description: Pepsi Football Nation, a worldwide initiative, is dedicated to honoring fan culture, collaborations, and brand engagements outside traditional football settings. With a rich history spanning over half a century, Pepsi Football Nation serves as a hub connecting fans from various teams, nations, and regions united by their passion for the sport. This platform aims to bring together a diverse community of fans to celebrate the essence of football beyond geographical boundaries.

data.title: CNOOC Limited Announces Huang Yongzhang as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In a press release today from CNOOC Limited, a company listed as SEHK: 00883 on the Hong Kong Dollar counter and 80883 on the Renminbi counter, as well as SSE: 600938, it was announced that Mr. Huang Yongzhang has been named the Vice Chairman, Executive Director, Chief Executive Officer, President, and more. This appointment signifies a significant development within the company.
